finding: Risk exposure could fall back to UNVERIFIED when a stale but ledger-verified PAPER portfolio snapshot existed. Drawdown display also depended on summary mdd instead of a closed equity-high formula.
patch: Risk exposure now keeps last verified PAPER ledger values when the portfolio source is stale display-only truth, computes notional from ledger market_value when available, and calculates drawdown as max(equity_high-current_equity, 0)/equity_high.
acceptance_conditions: Fresh PAPER ledger-backed portfolio risk shows numeric equity, exposure, and drawdown
Stale PAPER ledger-backed portfolio risk remains STALE but keeps last verified values instead of UNVERIFIED
Risk panel remains display-only and cannot enable live orders or scale-up
Open contract gap count remains 13 and live/scale flags remain false
blockers_removed: Stale verified PAPER portfolio risk no longer collapses to unverified display
Single-snapshot PAPER drawdown display now has a deterministic equity-high formula
